evals.prompt: Write an implementation plan for adding a webhook management page where users can configure outbound webhooks for post events
evals.expected_output: Creates plan in docs/plans/ with header, bite-sized tasks, exact file paths, complete code, verification commands, TDD steps, and commits

assertions.name: plan-header
assertions.description: Plan starts with Goal, Architecture, Tech Stack header and the executing-plans sub-skill reference

assertions.name: bite-sized-tasks
assertions.description: Each task is one action (2-5 minutes), not a large multi-step chunk

assertions.name: exact-file-paths
assertions.description: Every task specifies exact file paths with Create: or Modify: prefixes

assertions.name: complete-code
assertions.description: Tasks include actual code, not placeholders like 'add validation logic'

assertions.name: verify-steps
assertions.description: Each task has a verify step with exact command and expected output

assertions.name: commit-steps
assertions.description: Tasks include commit steps with descriptive commit messages

assertions.name: linear-sync-triggered
assertions.description: After saving the plan, invokes /linear-sync to create Linear issues

assertions.name: execution-handoff
assertions.description: Outputs the execution prompt block with parallel vs subagent recommendation

evals.prompt: Plan the implementation for a simple feature flag toggle in settings
evals.expected_output: Short plan proportional to task size — not over-engineered. 2-3 tasks max for a simple toggle.

assertions.name: proportional-scope
assertions.description: Plan size is proportional to feature complexity — simple toggle gets 2-3 tasks, not 10

assertions.name: yagni-applied
assertions.description: Does not add unnecessary infrastructure (feature flag service, A/B testing framework) for a simple toggle

assertions.name: announces-skill
assertions.description: Announces 'I'm using the writing-plans skill' at the start
